name: LG_UPDATE_BNTRANS_001_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATE_BNTRANS_001_01
       @COEF         SMALLINT,
       @BNACCREF     INT,
       @AMOUNT       FLOAT,
       @TRANSTYPE    SMALLINT,
       @TRCODE       SMALLINT,
       @CLIENTREF    INT,
       @DT           DATETIME,
       @SIGN         SMALLINT,
       @TRNET        FLOAT,
       @REPORTNET    FLOAT,
       @CANCELLED    SMALLINT,
       @TRNSTATE     SMALLINT,
       @TRANSDUEDATE DATETIME,
       @OPSTAT       SMALLINT,
      @STATUS       SMALLINT,
       @CSTRANSREF   INT,
       @COSTTYPE     SMALLINT AS
DECLARE @MON        SMALLINT
DECLARE @FND        SMALLINT
DECLARE @CALCSIGN   SMALLINT
DECLARE @CALCAMNT   FLOAT
DECLARE @CALCTYP    SMALLINT
DECLARE @VALID      SMALLINT
DECLARE @BNCARDTYPE SMALLINT
DECLARE @EPSILON    FLOAT
DECLARE @NEWLREF    INT
DECLARE @DEBITINC   FLOAT
DECLARE @CREDITINC  FLOAT
DECLARE @ACTIVE     SMALLINT
DECLARE @par_Year       SMALLINT
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001,
       @ACTIVE  = 0
SELECT @VALID = 0
IF (@BNACCREF <> 0) AND (@AMOUNT > @EPSILON) AND (@TRANSTYPE > 0) AND (@CANCELLED = 0) AND (@TRNSTATE = 0) AND ((@STATUS = 0) OR (@STATUS IS NULL)) AND (@CSTRANSREF <> -1)
  SELECT @VALID = 1
IF (@VALID = 1) AND ((@TRCODE = 3) OR (@TRCODE = 4))
  IF (@CLIENTREF <> 0)
    SELECT @VALID = 1
  ELSE SELECT @VALID = 0
IF (@VALID = 1) AND ((@OPSTAT <> 0) AND (@OPSTAT <> 2))
  SELECT @VALID = 0
               EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_001_01 @DT, @MON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
IF (@VALID = 1)
  BEGIN IF (@TRCODE = 5)
         BEGIN
          SELECT @MON  = 0
         END
        ELSE
          BEGIN IF (@TRANSDUEDATE IS NULL)
                  EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_001_01 @DT, @MON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
                ELSE EXECUTE LG_FINDRELATIVEMONTH_001_01 @TRANSDUEDATE, @MON OUTPUT, @par_Year OUTPUT
          END
        SELECT @FND      = 0,
               @CALCSIGN = @SIGN,
               @CALCAMNT = 0,
               @CALCTYP  = 0
        SELECT @BNCARDTYPE = CARDTYPE FROM LG_001_BANKACC WHERE LOGICALREF = @BNACCREF
        IF (@BNCARDTYPE = 3) OR (@BNCARDTYPE = 4) OR (@BNCARDTYPE = 6)
          SELECT @CALCAMNT = @TRNET
        ELSE SELECT @CALCAMNT = @AMOUNT
        IF (@BNCARDTYPE = 1) OR (@BNCARDTYPE = 3)
          SELECT @CALCTYP = @TRANSTYPE
        ELSE SELECT @CALCTYP = 4 + @TRANSTYPE
        IF (@CALCAMNT > @EPSILON)
          BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                                WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                                      (TOTTYP  = @CALCTYP)  AND
                                      (MONTH_  = @MON)
                                  AND (YEAR_   = @par_Year)
                                      )
                  BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                        INSERT INTO LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                          (CARDREF, TOTTYP, MONTH_, DEBIT, CREDIT
                          ,YEAR_
                          )
                          VALUES
                          (@BNACCREF, @CALCTYP, @MON, 0, 0
                          , @par_Year
                          )
                  END
                IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_001_01_GNTOTBN
                                WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                                      (TOTTYP  = -1))
                  BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_001_01_GNTOTBN @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                        INSERT INTO LG_001_01_GNTOTBN
                          (CARDREF, TOTTYP, DEBIT, CREDIT
                          )
                          VALUES
                          (@BNACCREF, -1, 0, 0
                          )
                  END
                IF (@CALCSIGN = @ACTIVE)
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = @CALCAMNT
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = 0
                  END
                ELSE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = @CALCAMNT
                  END
                SELECT @DEBITINC = @DEBITINC * @COEF
                SELECT @CREDITINC = @CREDITINC * @COEF
                UPDATE LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                  SET DEBIT  = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                      CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
                  WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                        (TOTTYP = @CALCTYP) AND
                        (MONTH_ = @MON)
                    AND (YEAR_   = @par_Year)
                UPDATE LG_001_01_GNTOTBN
                  SET DEBIT  = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                      CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
                  WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                        (TOTTYP  = -1)
          END
        SELECT @CALCAMNT = @REPORTNET
        SELECT @CALCTYP = @CALCTYP + 8
        IF (@CALCAMNT > @EPSILON)
          BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                                WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                                      (TOTTYP  = @CALCTYP)  AND
                                      (MONTH_  = @MON)
                                  AND (YEAR_   = @par_Year)
                                      )
                  BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                        INSERT INTO LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                          (CARDREF, TOTTYP, MONTH_, DEBIT, CREDIT
                          ,YEAR_
                          )
                           VALUES
                          (@BNACCREF, @CALCTYP, @MON, 0, 0
                          ,@par_Year
                          )
                  END
                IF (@CALCSIGN = @ACTIVE)
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = @CALCAMNT
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = 0
                  END
                ELSE
                  BEGIN SELECT @DEBITINC = 0
                        SELECT @CREDITINC = @CALCAMNT
                  END
                SELECT @DEBITINC = @DEBITINC * @COEF
                SELECT @CREDITINC = @CREDITINC * @COEF
                UPDATE LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL
                  SET DEBIT  = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                      CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
                  WHERE (CARDREF = @BNACCREF) AND
                        (TOTTYP = @CALCTYP) AND
                        (MONTH_ = @MON)
                    AND (YEAR_   = @par_Year)
          END
  END
